test_cases.test_case_title: Verify API requests within rate limits are processed successfully

test_cases.test_case_title: Verify API rate limiting blocks excessive requests with 429 status

test_steps: 1. Set up API client with valid credentials
2. Send API requests exceeding rate limit threshold
3. Verify initial requests are processed normally
4. Verify rate limit threshold is reached
5. Verify subsequent requests receive 429 Too Many Requests
6. Verify requests are blocked until rate limit resets
7. Verify rate limit reset allows normal processing
test_cases.expected_result: Excessive requests should be blocked with 429 status until rate limit resets

8. Verify restored data integrity matches original
